cases.text: aiignore: "0.1"

aiignore: "0.1"
metadata:
  name: "﻿embedded"
﻿﻿aiignore: "0.1"

aiignore: "0.1"
metadata:
  name: portable
{"aiignore":"0.1","metadata":{"name":"json-policy"},"rules":{}}

# policy comment
aiignore: '0.1'
metadata:
  name: quoted
  description: |
    first line
    second line
rules: {}

---
aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files: []
  environment: []
  network: []
  strings: []
...
metadata: {name: missing}
aiignore: "0.2"

aiignore: "0.1"
surprise: true

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, paths: [x], surprise: true}

aiignore: "0.1"
aiignore: "0.1"

aiignore: "0.1"
---
aiignore: "0.1"

aiignore: "0.1"
metadata: &meta {name: bad}

aiignore: "0.1"
metadata: !!map {name: bad}

aiignore: "0.1"
metadata: !private {name: bad}

aiignore: "0.1"
metadata:
  1: bad

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: Uppercase, effect: deny, paths: [x]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: low, effect: deny, priority: -1001, paths: [x]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: high, effect: deny, priority: 1001, paths: [x]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: fraction, effect: deny, priority: 0.5, paths: [x]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: empty, effect: deny, operations: [], paths: [x]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: duplicate, effect: deny, operations: [read, read], paths: [x]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  strings:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, patterns: [{type: literal, value: x}], replacement: hidden}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  environment:
    - {id: bad, effect: allow, names: [PUBLIC], replacement: hidden}

aiignore: "0.1"
metadata: {name: ""}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, paths: ["../private"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, paths: ["{a,b}"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  environment:
    - {id: bad, effect: drop, names: ["SECRET**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://*.127.0.0.1/**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com:65536/**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com:/**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com/a#b"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  strings:
    - id: bad
      effect: deny
      patterns: [{type: regex, value: "(a)\\1"}]

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  strings:
    - {id: bad, effect: redact, patterns: [{type: regex, value: "a*"}]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  strings:
    - {id: bad, effect: redact, patterns: [{type: regex, value: "\\b"}]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  strings:
    - {id: bad, effect: redact, patterns: [{type: glob, value: "*"}]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  strings:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, patterns: [{type: literal, value: ""}]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, paths: ["file["]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, paths: ["[z-a].txt"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  files:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, paths: ["[é].txt"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com/a%2fb"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com/%zz"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://%65xample.com/**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://bad_.example/**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com/café"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com?discarded/**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com\\discarded/**"]}

aiignore: "0.1"
rules:
  network:
    - {id: bad, effect: deny, urls: ["https://example.com\t/**"]}
